heading: Reevaluation of dependency and indemnity compensation determinations pursuant to changes in presumptions of service connection
label: 1305 Reevaluation of dependency and indemnity compensation determinations pursuant to changes in presumptions of service connection

children.label: B
children.text: were evaluated and denied by the Secretary before the date on which such provision of law went into effect; and

children.label: C
children.text: might have been evaluated differently had the establishment or modification been applicable to the claim;
allow for the reevaluation of such claims at the election of the claimant; and

notwithstanding , with respect to claims approved pursuant to such reevaluation, provide compensation under this chapter effective as if the establishment or modification of the presumption of service connection had been in effect on the date of the submission of the original claim described in paragraph (1).section 5110 of this title

The Secretary shall conduct outreach to inform relevant claimants that they may elect to have a claim be reevaluated in light of the establishment or modification of a presumption of service connection described in subsection (a).

children.label: A
children.text: The Secretary shall publish on the internet website of the Department a notice that such claimants may elect to have a claim so reevaluated.

children.label: B
children.text: The Secretary shall notify, in writing or by electronic means, veterans service organizations of the ability of such claimants to elect to have a claim so reevaluated.

children.label: C
children.text: The Secretary shall contact each claimant identified under subsection (a) in the same manner that the Department last provided notice of a decision.
